name: hook-ecosystem-audit
purpose: Comprehensive diagnostic of the hook ecosystem across 6 domains and 20 categories with composite health scoring (A-F), trend tracking, patch suggestions, and interactive finding-by-finding walkthrough covering Claude Code hooks, pre-commit pipeline, and CI/CD pipeline health.
external_refs: npx tsx write-invocation.ts (scripts/reviews/write-invocation.ts — SoNash-specific invocation tracking)
symlink-guard (.claude/hooks/lib/symlink-guard — runtime dep loaded with graceful fallback)
sanitize_fields: dependencies (npm run hooks:test assumes SoNash npm scripts)
notes: Version 2.0 (2026-03-08). File count: 29. Size: 359228 bytes (largest of the 5). Only skill in this tier that retains full inline SKILL.md protocol (not refactored to _shared/ecosystem-audit/ redirects) — hook-ecosystem-audit is the REFERENCE IMPLEMENTATION from which the others diverged. REFERENCE.md present (flat layout). scripts/lib/constants.js is unique to this skill (Claude Code hook protocol constants — HOOK_PROTOCOL object). scoring.js, state-manager.js, safe-fs.js, parse-jsonl-line.js are nominally copies but with audit-specific header comments. patch-generator.js is fully domain-specific (hook patch types: config_fix, add_try_catch, add_sanitize_import, fix_regex, fix_pipeline_stage, fix_output_protocol). Symlink-guard loaded via __dirname/../../../hooks/lib/symlink-guard — fails gracefully. DEFERRED: no deferred sections found in SKILL.md itself. Invocation tracking calls npx tsx write-invocation.ts — SoNash product code dep (scripts/reviews/). State files: .claude/tmp/hook-audit-progress.json (ephemeral), .claude/tmp/hook-audit-session-*.jsonl (ephemeral), .claude/state/hook-ecosystem-audit-history.jsonl (persistent trend log).

name: tdms-ecosystem-audit
purpose: Comprehensive diagnostic of the Technical Debt Management System across 5 domains and 16 categories, covering all 37 TDMS scripts, MASTER_DEBT.jsonl data files, pipeline integrity, deduplication accuracy, roadmap cross-references, and reporting accuracy.
notes: Version 1.2 (2026-03-25 — _shared extraction). File count: 24. Size: 272645 bytes. No REFERENCE.md — SKILL.md delegates all shared protocol sections to _shared/ecosystem-audit/ read directives. CRITICAL: portability is not-portable because EVERY checker hardcodes SoNash-specific paths: docs/technical-debt/MASTER_DEBT.jsonl (4500+ items), docs/technical-debt/raw/deduped.jsonl, scripts/debt/ (37 TDMS scripts), ROADMAP.md. This audit is a TDMS-health tool — TDMS itself is a SoNash product system (debt tracking pipeline) that does not exist in JASON-OS. The skill cannot be used without the entire TDMS ecosystem. Portability would require a complete TDMS port first, then this audit would be portable. Session #134 critical bug referenced inline (generate-views.js reads deduped, overwrites master). State files: .claude/tmp/tdms-audit-progress.json (ephemeral), .claude/state/tdms-ecosystem-audit-history.jsonl (persistent).

name: pr-ecosystem-audit
purpose: Comprehensive diagnostic of the PR review ecosystem across 5 domains and 18 categories with composite health scoring, covering skill invocation fidelity, data/state health, pattern lifecycle enforcement, feedback loop integration, and effectiveness metrics.
external_refs: SonarCloud/Qodo (indirectly — checkers verify external tool configuration is current)
notes: Version 1.3 (2026-03-25 — _shared extraction). File count: 24. Size: 271730 bytes. No REFERENCE.md — all shared protocol delegated to _shared/ecosystem-audit/. patch-generator.js is most diverged from hook baseline: adds pattern_rule, qodo_config, skill_update patch types and uses different error-handling style (direct require() not try-catch). Checkers consume .claude/state/reviews.jsonl and docs/AI_REVIEW_LEARNINGS_LOG.md — both are SoNash-specific PR review state files that JASON-OS does not have (JASON-OS uses a simpler .planning/PR_REVIEW_LEARNINGS.md). State files: .claude/tmp/pr-audit-progress.json (ephemeral), .claude/tmp/ecosystem-audit-session-*.jsonl (note: session log path prefix differs from other audits), .claude/state/pr-ecosystem-audit-history.jsonl (persistent).

name: session-ecosystem-audit
purpose: Comprehensive diagnostic of the Session Ecosystem across 5 domains and 17 categories, covering session lifecycle skills, compaction resilience layers (A/C/D), cross-session safety invariants, hook registration alignment, and state file management.
sanitize_fields: checkers/compaction-resilience.js (hardcoded .claude/settings.json hook registrations for 7 named hooks, .claude/hooks/commit-tracker.js, .claude/hooks/pre-compaction-save.js, .claude/hooks/compact-restore.js)
notes: Version 1.2 (2026-03-25 — _shared extraction). File count: 24. Size: 253477 bytes. No REFERENCE.md. patch-generator.js uses distinct variable naming (_fs, _path) compared to other forks. Patch types are session-domain-specific: hook_register, state_fix, context_update, gap_fix, cleanup, counter_fix. Compaction resilience checker is the most deeply project-coupled component — it expects exact SoNash hook filenames and settings.json structure. HOWEVER: the hook names it checks (commit-tracker.js, pre-compaction-save.js, compact-restore.js, compaction-handoff.js) ARE present in JASON-OS, so this checker may be largely correct for JASON-OS if settings.json registrations exist. The SESSION_CONTEXT.md checker and session counter logic are JASON-OS-portable concepts. State files: .claude/tmp/session-audit-progress.json (ephemeral), .claude/state/session-ecosystem-audit-history.jsonl (persistent).

name: script-ecosystem-audit
purpose: Comprehensive diagnostic of script infrastructure under scripts/**/*.js across 5 domains and 18 categories — module system consistency, safety/error handling, npm registration, code quality, and testing reliability — with composite health scoring and interactive walkthrough.
dependencies: npm run skills:validate (referenced in routing guide)
external_refs: symlink-guard (.claude/hooks/lib/symlink-guard — loaded via ROOT_DIR path, graceful fallback)
sanitize_fields: checkers/registration-reachability.js (reads package.json scripts section — project-specific npm script names)
checkers/safety-error-handling.js (references CLAUDE.md Section 5 anti-patterns — portable concept but project-specific file path)
checkers/module-consistency.js (checks for CJS/ESM mixed usage — portable logic but SoNash-specific package.json type field)
run-script-ecosystem-audit.js (uses ROOT_DIR detection via package.json walk — portable but script scope is scripts/**/*.js — SoNash directory structure)
notes: Version 2.0 (2026-03-08). File count: 25. Size: 238918 bytes (smallest of the 5). REFERENCE.md present (flat layout) — retained from pre-_shared-extraction era. SKILL.md retains full inline protocol rather than delegating to _shared/ for most sections, similar to hook-ecosystem-audit v2.0 rewrite. Script scope is explicitly scripts/**/*.js — in JASON-OS this maps directly to the scripts/ directory. Skill-local scripts (.claude/skills/*/scripts/) are out of scope per routing guide (owned by /skill-ecosystem-audit). patch-generator.js forked from hook-ecosystem-audit with domain-specific patch types: fix_module_system, add_documentation, fix_deprecated_api, add_security_helper. run-script-ecosystem-audit.js uses ROOT_DIR detection differently (ROOT_DIR constant vs findProjectRoot() function in others). CLAUDE.md Section 5 (Critical Anti-Patterns) is referenced as the source of correctness patterns — this is portable since JASON-OS also has CLAUDE.md Section 5. State files: .claude/tmp/script-audit-progress.json (ephemeral), .claude/tmp/script-audit-session-*.jsonl (ephemeral), .claude/state/script-ecosystem-audit-history.jsonl (persistent — written by audit script automatically).
